title: The Children of Elbaf Panic
description: On pages 13–13, this part follows Dorry, Unknown person #13, Loki, Giants, Jarul as The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.
scene: The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the Svalr-mode of our mighty ship, the great EIRIK!!

dialogue.speaker: Loki
dialogue.text: You monsters are in for it now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll get you for making us waste our booze!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Yes!! Did the chiefs do that?!

dialogue.speaker: Giants
dialogue.text: No, it's the giant warrior pirates!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry we're late!! We had to Barf up all that booze!! what a waste!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You guys, take care of the kids!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He he he he he he he he he!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Exploration through 14 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
